episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 1-4 Waiting for God
episodeList.description: Lister 'learns' Cat writing and discovers some startling facts.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 1-5 Confidence and Paranoia
episodeList.description: Lister contracts a mutated form of pneumonia - and his hallucinations turn solid.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 1-6 Me Squared
episodeList.description: Rimmer has discovered how to make a duplicate and moves in with himself.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 2-1 Kryten
episodeList.description: Things are fine aboard crashed spaceship Nova 5 until Red Dwarf answers its distress call.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 2-2 Better than Life
episodeList.description: Rimmer and Lister find a computer game which plugs directly into the brain.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 2-3 Thanks for the Memory
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-2/../Core/Red Dwarf/2-3 Thanks for the Memory.mp4
episodeList.description: Someone's erased four days of the crew's memory, broken Lister's leg and done the jigsaw.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 2-4 Stasis Leak
episodeList.description: A leak from the suspended animation chamber has created a doorway to the past.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 2-5 Queeg
episodeList.description: Holly's behaviour begins to endanger the ship so he's replaced by the back-up computer.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 2-6 Parallel Universe
episodeList.description: Holly devises a faster-than-light drive that sends the crew into a parallel universe.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 3-1 Backwards
episodeList.description: Lister and Rimmer finally arrive back on earth only to find time is behaving strangely.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 3-2 Marooned
episodeList.description: Lister and Rimmer are stranded on a moon with only a pot noodle and a tin of dog food.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 3-3 Polymorph
episodeList.description: A genetic mutant gets loose aboard the ship, leading to 24 hours of gruesome horror.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 3-4 Bodyswap
episodeList.description: Rimmer convinces Lister that they should swap bodies for a fortnight.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 3-5 Timeslides
episodeList.description: Kryten discovers some developing fluid which prints photographs the crew can walk into.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 3-6 The Last Day
episodeList.description: Kryten discovers his in-built expiry date is only 24 hours away.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 4-1 Camille
episodeList.description: Kryten falls in love at first sight but has his heart broken in the process.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 4-2 D.N.A
episodeList.description: The crew encounter the ultimate in genetic engineering technology.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 4-3 Justice
episodeList.description: The crew land up in 'Justice World', where a crime's consequences affect the perpetrator.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 4-4 White Hole
episodeList.description: Holly leaves the crew drifting helplessly towards a white hole.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 4-5 Dimension Jump
episodeList.description: In a parallel universe, an Arnold Rimmer exists who's charming, popular, brave and modest.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 4-6 Meltdown
episodeList.description: A transporter whisks the crew to 'Waxworld' - a theme park where things are going wrong.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 5-1 Holoship
episodeList.description: Rimmer is transmitted from Red Dwarf to the advanced holoship Enlightenment.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 5-2 The Inquisitor
episodeList.description: The Inquisitor roams through time, weeding out life's wastrels and deleting the worthless.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 1-2 Space Fall
episodeList.description: Blake and his companions are on the prison space transporter bound for Cygnus Alpha.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 1-3 Cygnus Alpha
episodeList.description: In the alien spaceship which they have named Liberator, Blake, Jenna and Avon plan to free the prisoners held on Cygnus Alpha.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 1-4 Time Squad
episodeList.description: On their way to attack the Federation communications complex, Blake and his crew discover a mysterious projectile drifting in space.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 1-13 Orac
episodeList.description: What is the mysterious Orac? The Federation want it, but Blake must get to it first.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 2-1 Redemption
episodeList.description: Blake and his crew witness an explosion that destroys their spaceship, the Liberator.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 2-2 Shadow
episodeList.description: Blake tries to buy the help of the Terra Nostra, a dangerous crime syndicate.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 2-3 Weapon
episodeList.description: Something very secret and dangerous is stolen from the Weapons Development Base of the Federation.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 2-4 Horizon
episodeList.description: Blake takes the Liberator towards the edge of the galaxy while fleeing ship patrols.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 2-7 Killer
episodeList.description: On the planet Fosforon, Avon tries to persuade an old friend to hand over a vital component in the latest Federation cypher machine.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 2-8 Hostage
episodeList.description: Although now an outlaw from the Federation, Travis is still determined to kill Blake.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 2-9 Countdown
episodeList.description: An entire world is under sentence of death unless Blake and the rest of his crew can save it.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 2-10 Voice from the Past
episodeList.description: A mysterious telepathic signal plunges Blake back into the nightmare of his torture and trial.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 2-13 Star One
episodeList.description: Blake's search for Star One, the secret Federation control centre, takes him to the edge of the galaxy.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 3-1 Aftermath
episodeList.description: In a desperate attempt to delay the invading aliens until the Federation battle fleet arrive, Blake has sacrificed the Liberator.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 1-5 The Web
episodeList.description: Blake and his companions discover that Cally, their new crew member, has sabotaged the Liberator.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 1-6 Seek-Locate-Destroy
episodeList.description: Blake plans to steal the message decoder from a top security installation on the planet Centero.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 1-7 Mission to Destiny
episodeList.description: The crippled spaceship Ortega presents Blake and his companions with a series of mysteries.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 1-8 Duel
episodeList.description: The flight of Federation pursuit ships, commanded by Travis, finally succeed in trapping the Liberator.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 1-9 Project Avalon
episodeList.description: Travis has devised an evil plan to destroy Blake and capture the Liberator.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 1-10 Breakdown
episodeList.description: An implant in Gan's brain designed to limit aggressive impulses malfunctions.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 1-11 Bounty
episodeList.description: Blake and Cally attempt to rescue President Sarkoff, a prisoner of the Federation.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 1-12 Deliverance
episodeList.description: The crew of the Liberator look for survivors from a crashed spaceship on the planet Cephlon.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 2-11 Gambit
episodeList.description: The search for Docholli - the man with the secret of Star One - brings Blake to Freedom City.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 2-12 The Keeper
episodeList.description: One of the tribal chiefs on the planet Goth unknowingly holds the secret of Star One.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 2-5 Pressure Point
episodeList.description: Within the Forbidden Zone is Control, the computer complex which runs the entire Federation.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 2-6 Trial
episodeList.description: As a result of Blake's abortive attack on the Federation's control centre, a court martial is issued against Travis by Servalan in Space Command.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 1-1 The End
episodeList.description: Red Dwarf is a mining ship with a crew of 169.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 1-2 Future Echos
episodeList.description: Red Dwarf breaks the light barrier and Rimmer sees a death in the future.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 1-3 Balance of Power
episodeList.description: Cult space comedy series.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 5-3 Terrorform
episodeList.description: Rimmer is taken prisoner in his own mind.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 5-4 Quarantine
episodeList.description: Rimmer forces the crew to spend 12 weeks in quarantine.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 5-5 Demons and Angels
episodeList.description: The Red Dwarf crew create good and evil doppelgängers of themselves.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 5-6 Back to Reality
episodeList.description: The crew of Red Dwarf discover an abandoned space ship on an ocean bed.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 6-1 Psirens
episodeList.description: The crew awake after 200 years in suspended animation to find the ship has been stolen.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 6-2 Legion
episodeList.description: With supplies running low, the crew find themselves dragged to a deserted space station.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 6-3 Gunmen of the Apocalypse
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-2/../Core/Red Dwarf/6-3 Gunmen of the Apocalypse.mp4
episodeList.description: Kryten contracts a computer virus, so the crew must enter his electronic mindscape.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 6-4 Emohawk Polymorph II
episodeList.description: The crew need replacement engine parts from the fearsome Kinatowi clan.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 6-5 Rimmerworld
episodeList.description: After escaping a disintegrating ship, Rimmer's pod is sucked into a wormhole in time.

episodeList.title: RED DWARF: 6-6 Out of Time
episodeList.description: The crew encounter several unreality bubbles.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 1-1 The Way Back
episodeList.description: Sci-fi series following a group of rebels from Earth fighting an evil dictatorship, The Federation.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 3-2 Powerplay
episodeList.description: As Avon and Vila fight separate battles for survival, each find it difficult to distinguish between friends and enemies.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 3-3 Volcano
episodeList.description: For the Liberator's crew the planet Obsidian offers the prospect of allies and a safe base from which to work.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 3-4 Dawn of the Gods
episodeList.description: When the Liberator is mysteriously drawn off course it takes the crew vital time to find out why.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 3-5 The Harvest of Kairos
episodeList.description: A mysterious death awaits anyone who remains on the the planet Kairos after the harvest week.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 3-6 City at the Edge of the World
episodeList.shortName: 3-6 City at the Edge of the World
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-2/../Core/Blake's-7/3- 6 City at the Edge of the World.mp4
episodeList.description: In an ancient and deserted city on the planet Keezarn, Vila struggles to open a mysterious vault.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 3-7 Children of Auron
episodeList.description: When a deadly disease strikes the planet Auron, Cally is summoned to return home to help her people.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 3-8 Rumours of Death
episodeList.description: Avon returns to Earth looking for the Federation torturer who killed the woman he loved.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 3-9 Sarcophagus
episodeList.description: In deep space the Liberator finds an alien ship, drifting and unmanned.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 3-10 Ultraworld
episodeList.description: To the crew of the Liberator the strange artificial planet Ultraworld appears lifeless.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 3-11 Moloch
episodeList.description: The planet Sardos holds the secret of almost limitless wealth and power.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 3-12 Death-Watch
episodeList.description: The ritual war fought by two professional champions seems like the ultimate spectator sport.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 3-13 Terminal
episodeList.description: Darkness descends over the crew as their original leader Blake seems to be returning.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 4-1 Rescue
episodeList.description: Avon and the crew of the Liberator are struggling to survive on the hostile world of Terminal.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 4-2 Power
episodeList.description: Vila discovers that the silo containing Scorpio is impossible to open.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 4-3 Traitor
episodeList.description: Avon needs to know why the Federation are suddenly making such easy territorial gains.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 4-4 Stardrive
episodeList.description: A collision with an asteroid damages Scorpio's main drives.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 4-5 Animals
episodeList.description: Justin is a genetic engineer who has knowledge which Avon needs.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 4-6 Headhunter
episodeList.description: Muller is Avon's latest recruit and a genius in his field, but even a genius cannot come back from the dead.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 4-7 Assassin
episodeList.description: Avon and his companions become targets for murder.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 4-8 Games
episodeList.description: The planet Mecron is the only source of Feldon, a rare and extremely valuable crystal.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 4-9 Sand
episodeList.description: The Federation's sudden concern for a long lost expedition to the planet Vim arouses the interest of Avon and his companions.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 4-10 Gold
episodeList.description: Stealing a gold shipment from an undefended pleasure cruiser en route to Earth seems too good an opportunity to miss.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 4-11 Orbit
episodeList.description: A renegade Federation scientist makes an interesting offer to Avon.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 4-12 Warlord
episodeList.description: Avon calls a meeting on Xenon between the five most powerful factions resisting the Federation.

episodeList.title: BLAKE'S-7: 4-13 Blake
episodeList.description: The crew think they are going to be able to run away from the Federation, but Avon has other ideas, and sets off to find Blake.
